title: Automate groups with the title of the day and date.
excerpt: I tried with the automation “Every day create a group,” but in the “group” field, I don’t know what to put to make the day and current date appear when the group is created. Please help.

posts.author: sebas (Sebastian)
posts.cookedHtml: I tried with the automation “Every day create a group,” but in the “group” field, I don’t know what to put to make the day and current date appear when the group is created. Please help.
